textByHash.5f680d841ffc7f193b46eac341d7012347b2efc8: I'm Piles. I lived in Draynor Village when I was young, where I saw three men working in the market, converting items to banknotes.
textByHash.855760011aac967b68a458b57e1066bcbc50842e: Hello. I can convert items to banknotes, for 50 coins per item. Just hand me the items you'd like me to convert.
textByHash.9f252af711e8edf3a71bcda3b15d86bb160e9a99: Their names were Niles, Miles and Giles. I'm trying to be like them, so I've changed my name and started this business here.
